# @json-express/kv-memory — AI Context

In-process key-value store with TTL support. The development-grade `kv-*` choice.

## Install — that is the whole integration
```
npm i @json-express/kv-memory
```
Discovery is automatic. **Never import or register it.**

## Configuration (.env — case-insensitive)
| Key | Default | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| `jex.kv.purgeIntervalMs` | `30000` | Expired-entry sweep interval (0 disables) |

## What it unlocks
- `ctx.kvStore.get/set/delete` in model hooks and custom endpoints; `set(key, value, { ttlMs })` for expiring entries (OTPs, rate-limit counters, temp tokens).
- Satisfies `plugin-identity`'s required KV dependency in development. Swap to `kv-redis` for production — same surface.
